subtasks.description: Query MongoDB for all active billing contracts with contracted annual value
Query SQL warehouse for all invoices issued in 2024, summed by contract, to get actual billed amounts

Reconcile contracted annual values from MongoDB against 2024 actual invoiced amounts from SQL. Calculate variance percentage for each contract. Flag contracts with material variance >10%. Classify each contract's billing posture (on-track, under-billed, over-billed).

plan.cost_rationale: This plan uses three subtasks: (1) mongo_query (small) to retrieve active contract metadata from the contract system; (2) sql_gen (small) to aggregate 2024 invoice amounts by contract from the billing warehouse — both data retrieval tasks are straightforward and can run in parallel; (3) cross_recon (mid tier) to join the two datasets, compute variance percentages, flag material deviations >10%, and classify billing posture. The mid tier is assigned to cross_recon because it must reason across two sources, perform variance calculations, and apply a threshold rule to determine flag status. No separate policy_action is needed because variance flagging is a data-driven classification rule, not a governance policy evaluation. The plan is minimal: reconciliation inherently requires fetching both sources and comparing them in a single step.

output.sql: SELECT contract_id, SUM(amount_usd) AS total_invoiced_2024 FROM invoice_facts WHERE invoice_date >= '2024-01-01' AND invoice_date < '2025-01-01' GROUP BY contract_id
